query: SELECT v.empresaId, MAX(e.nome) as empresa, MAX(v.nomeVersao) as versao, COUNT(l.id) as linhas, SUM(l.totalAnual) as total FROM orcamento_versoes v JOIN orcamento_planejado_linhas l ON l.versaoId = v.id JOIN empresas e ON e.id = v.empresaId GROUP BY v.id, v.empresaId ORDER BY v.empresaId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4X2C2Km2DVLwNTk.c1886cf7bd86 --database GdPAuRogRcNPzV7ENB2n8s --execute SELECT v.empresaId, MAX(e.nome) as empresa, MAX(v.nomeVersao) as versao, COUNT(l.id) as linhas, SUM(l.totalAnual) as total FROM orcamento_versoes v JOIN orcamento_planejado_linhas l ON l.versaoId = v.id JOIN empresas e ON e.id = v.empresaId GROUP BY v.id, v.empresaId ORDER BY v.empresaId;
